title: T-005 — quality_status_types table + 7-row seed (D3 contract)
prompt:
# T-005 — quality_status_types table + seed

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §6.3 quality_status_types DDL + 7-row seed, §10.1 qa_status_state_machine_v1 D3 contract
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `quality_status_types` lookup table with 7 seeded statuses (PENDING, PASSED, FAILED, HOLD, RELEASED, QUARANTINED, COND_APPROVED) including allows_shipment / allows_consumption flags used by 05-WH §12.2 gating logic.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0101_quality_status_types.sql` creates the table per §6.3 (code TEXT PRIMARY KEY, label, allows_shipment, allows_consumption, description) and INSERTs 7 rows verbatim from §6.3 seed.
2. Drizzle schema entry `packages/db/src/schema/qualityStatusTypes.ts` exporting typed read.
3. Helper `apps/web/src/server/quality/qaStatus.ts` exporting `isShippable(code)` and `isConsumable(code)` reading from this table (cached for 60s).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0101_quality_status_types.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityStatusTypes.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/qaStatus.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/qaStatus.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0101 applied, when SELECT * FROM quality_status_types runs, then exactly 7 rows are present and only (PASSED, RELEASED, COND_APPROVED) have allows_shipment=true and allows_consumption=true
2. Given the helper, when isShippable('HOLD') and isShippable('PASSED') run, then the first returns false and the second returns true
3. Given the helper, when isShippable('UNKNOWN') runs, then it throws or returns false (configurable strict mode) and emits a quality.unknown_status_lookup audit log entry

pipeline_inputs.description: Create quality_status_types lookup table + seed 7 baseline rows + isShippable/isConsumable helpers.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0101 creates table (code PK, label, allows_shipment, allows_consumption, description) and inserts the 7 rows from §6.3 verbatim. Helper qaStatus.ts queries the table with 60s in-memory cache; isShippable returns boolean and unknown codes log a quality.unknown_status_lookup audit event.

Given helper qaStatus, when isShippable('HOLD') and isShippable('PASSED') run, then the first returns false and the second returns true

test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/qaStatus.test.ts asserting row counts, allows_shipment matrix, and unknown-code behavior before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test qaStatus'
